title: Student commencement speakers have message of perseverance for fellow IU Bloomington graduates
summary_en: Jayvee Del Rosario, a public affairs student, will speak at the graduate commencement, set for 3 p.m. May 8 at Simon Skjodt Assembly Hall. Katherine Johnson, a business student, will speak at the u...
title_cn: 印第安纳大学伯明顿分校2026届毕业典礼学生代表将传递坚持不懈理念
